Package org.areslib.telemetry

Interface AresLoggerBackend

All Known Implementing Classes:
AndroidDashboardBackend, RlogServerBackend, WpiLogBackend
public interface AresLoggerBackend
Interface representing a backend sink for telemetry data.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    close()
    Releases any resources held by this backend (file handles, sockets, etc.).
    void
    putBoolean(String key, boolean value)
    Logs a boolean value.
    void
    putBooleanArray(String key, boolean[] values)
    Logs an array of booleans.
    void
    putNumber(String key, double value)
    Logs a numeric value.
    void
    putNumberArray(String key, double[] values)
    Logs an array of numbers.
    void
    putString(String key, String value)
    Logs a string.
    void
    putStringArray(String key, String[] values)
    Logs an array of strings.
    default void
    putStruct(String key, String typeString, byte[] data)
    Logs serialized structural data.
    void
    update()
    Triggers the backend to flush/send current packets.

  • Method Details

    • putNumber

      void putNumber(String key, double value)
      Logs a numeric value.
      Parameters:
      key - The telemetry key.
      value - The value.

    • putNumberArray

      void putNumberArray(String key, double[] values)
      Logs an array of numbers.
      Parameters:
      key - The telemetry key.
      values - The value array.

    • putString

      void putString(String key, String value)
      Logs a string.
      Parameters:
      key - The telemetry key.
      value - The string value.

    • putStruct

      default void putStruct(String key, String typeString, byte[] data)
      Logs serialized structural data.
      Parameters:
      key - The telemetry key.
      typeString - Structural metadata.
      data - Raw structural bytes.

    • putBoolean

      void putBoolean(String key, boolean value)
      Logs a boolean value.
      Parameters:
      key - The telemetry key.
      value - The value.

    • putBooleanArray

      void putBooleanArray(String key, boolean[] values)
      Logs an array of booleans.
      Parameters:
      key - The telemetry key.
      values - The value array.

    • putStringArray

      void putStringArray(String key, String[] values)
      Logs an array of strings.
      Parameters:
      key - The telemetry key.
      values - The value array.

    • update

      void update()
      Triggers the backend to flush/send current packets.

    • close

      default void close()
      Releases any resources held by this backend (file handles, sockets, etc.). Called automatically by AresTelemetry.clearBackends() during OpMode transitions.
